parameters.query: SELECT brand_voice, niche, icp, value_props, writing_style, company_name FROM user_ai_config WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}' LIMIT 1
SELECT system_prompt FROM operator_prompts WHERE component = 'sales_script_subagent' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO content_outputs (user_id, type, payload, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  'sales_script_{{ $json.script_type }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ script_title: $json.script_title, offer_name: $json.offer_name, target_persona: $json.target_persona, price_point: $json.price_point, script_type: $json.script_type, opening: $json.opening, discovery_questions: $json.discovery_questions, objection_handlers: $json.objection_handlers, close: $json.close, followup_lines: $json.followup_lines }) }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
